case_title: ADNAN ATSHAN VS. DAWIT S KAHSAY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATSHAN, ADNAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAHSAY, DAWIT S $3,258.75 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,353.75, DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF ARE EACH 50% RESPONSIBLE FOR THIS AUTO ACCIDENT. SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:18
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Dawit S. Kahsay present in pro per. Haile Beyene interprets English/Ethiopian and Ethiopian/English on behalf of the Appellant. Respondent, Adnan Atshan present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight.

EXRA: Photos, maps; collectively marked.

AM
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.
